## Checklist

- [ ] My code follows the project's coding standards
- [ ] I have read the CONTRIBUTING guide
- [ ] I have followed the development workflow
- [ ] My changes are deterministic (simulation) or explainable (AI)
- [ ] I have not introduced LLM calls where deterministic logic suffices
- [ ] No secrets, credentials, or API keys are committed
- [ ] This PR is scoped to a single logical change
